rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use visible feature names in AGREE expressions
Write output dependency guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use AGREE annex blocks for component type contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
Use comparison expressions for bool type declarations
Use integer literals and arithmetic for int type declarations
Use real literals and arithmetic for real type declarations
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
